positive: A minimalist, stylized representation of a soaring paper crane against a soft, gradient sunrise sky. The crane silhouette is the main subject, capturing movement and grace. Use clean lines, negative space, and high contrast. Color palette: soft peach, pale indigo, and brilliant white. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, with the crane placed in the upper third. Style: Modern graphic design, vector art influence, inspired by Japanese minimalist aesthetic. Lighting: Soft, diffused light emphasizing the clean edges and shadows. Aspect ratio suitable for repeating apparel patterns, with clean edges and simple, striking design elements.
negative: artifacts, blur, text, watermark, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, messy, cluttered background, photorealism, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, poor composition
